response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo has extensive experience in software engineering, including leadership roles and entrepreneurial ventures, aligning well with the role's technical and innovative requirements. However, her background lacks explicit AI specialization, cloud platform strategy, or director-level experience. Her recent work in AI-agent infrastructure is promising but not deeply rooted in AI strategy or cloud product development.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with a focus on technical innovation and leadership
Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) demonstrating product development and strategic vision
Expertise in multiple languages and frameworks, showcasing adaptability and technical depth
concerns: Limited direct experience in cloud platform strategy or AI product development at scale
No evidence of recognized expertise in AI (e.g., publications, patents, or widely adopted AI products)
Missing preferred qualifications (Master's/PhD in AI, cloud/AI expertise) and director-level leadership roles
